diagram_title: Render App Management Interface — A55 Decomposition

activities.title: Serve App List API
activities.description: GET endpoint returning all Apps with manifest metadata, status, and tool count

activities.title: Preview App Before Adding
activities.description: Read manifest from path without connecting, return card preview data

activities.title: Accept App Addition Request
activities.description: POST endpoint accepting path or GitHub URL, triggering acquire → validate → register pipeline

activities.title: Render App Card Components
activities.description: Frontend cards showing icon, name, description, status badge, tool count, source, enable/disable toggle, remove button
